title: KFRTI Director Jennifer Johnson credits team after receiving IFSAC Organizational Excellence Award
summary_en: Jenn Johnson, director of the Kansas Fire & Rescue Training Institute, was awarded the Organizational Excellence Award by the International Fire Service Accreditation Congress on April 10.
title_cn: 堪萨斯州消防救援训练所主任詹妮弗·约翰逊获国际消防服务认证大会组织卓越奖

title: School of Pharmacy announces Distinguished Service Award recipient
summary_en: Gene Hotchkiss has been selected as the recipient of the KU School of Pharmacy’s 2026 Distinguished Service Award after a lifetime of service to the school. He is a KU alumnus and completed his career as senior associate dean before retiring in 2020.
title_cn: 堪萨斯大学药学院公布2026年度杰出服务奖获奖人选

title: Poetry translator serves as cross-cultural ambassador for latest project, ‘Last Stops of the Night Journey’
summary_en: A University of Kansas professor says his latest translation of an Italian poetry collection, like all his work, is driven by his love of literature. Patrizio Ceccagnoli will give a reading for Milo De Angelis’ “Last Stops of the Night Journey” on April 28.
title_cn: 诗歌翻译家帕特里齐奥·切卡尼奥利推出最新译著《夜行末站》 担当跨文化交流大使

title: Spencer Museum announces 2026 Brosseau Creativity Award recipients
summary_en: The Spencer Museum of Art has awarded four KU undergraduate students from Kansas with Brosseau Creativity Awards, which honor innovative and risk-taking creative work in any area of study.
title_cn: 堪萨斯大学斯宾塞艺术博物馆公布2026年度杰克与拉冯·布鲁索创意奖获奖名单

title: KU Bales Choral Society to stage spring concert
summary_en: The KU Bales Choral Society will present its spring concert at 7 p.m. May 3 at Corpus Christi Catholic Church. The BSC is composed of University of Kansas faculty, staff and students, and KU brass and percussion musicians make up the orchestra.
title_cn: 堪萨斯大学贝尔斯合唱团将举办春季音乐会

title: KU School of Business announces 2026 Distinguished Alumni Award recipients
summary_en: The KU School of Business will recognize John Brandmeyer and Ron Lockton as 2026 Distinguished Alumni Award recipients for their leadership, impact and service.
title_cn: 堪萨斯大学商学院公布2026年度杰出校友奖获奖人选

title: First US ambassador-at-large for Arctic Affairs and 11th Airborne Division colonel to open the 2026 KU Security Conference
summary_en: Mike Sfraga, the first U.S. ambassador-at-large for Arctic Affairs, and Col. Russell Vanderlugt, commanding officer of the U.S. Army 11th Airborne Division Arctic Aviation Command, will be in conversation with Dole Institute Visiting Fellow Jerry Seib at 7 p.m. May 5.
title_cn: 美国首任北极事务无任所大使及陆军第11空降师上校将为2026年堪萨斯大学安全会议揭幕

title: Christian nationalists more likely to oppose gun regulations and support political violence, study finds
summary_en: A new article by Don Haider-Markel, professor of political science at the University of Kansas, finds that for Christian nationalists with a high gun-owner identity, there is an instilled culture of personal and community protection that makes them more likely to endorse extreme actions like violence.
title_cn: 研究发现基督教民族主义者更倾向反对枪支管制并支持政治暴力

title: Joshua Newman named dean of the KU School of Education & Human Sciences
summary_en: The University of Kansas has named Joshua Newman as the next dean of the School of Education & Human Sciences. Newman is currently the associate dean for research and Sara Lavinia de Keni Endowed Professor at Florida State University’s Anne Spencer Daves College of Education, Health, and Human Sciences.
title_cn: 堪萨斯大学任命约书亚·纽曼为教育与人类科学学院院长

title: $2.5M gift continues momentum for KU’s entrepreneurship hub
summary_en: Mathew and Kelly Stava have pledged $2.5 million to propel completion of a new building that will serve as the entrepreneurship hub for the University of Kansas.
title_cn: 马修·斯塔瓦夫妇捐赠250万美元推进堪萨斯大学创业中心建设

title: KU Global Scholars to showcase international research at annual symposium
summary_en: Seven University of Kansas seniors will mark the end of their Global Scholars experience by presenting their research to the public April 23. The Global Scholars program provides intercultural learning opportunities and faculty-mentored research for students with an interest in international studies.
title_cn: 堪萨斯大学全球学者将在年度研讨会上展示国际领域研究成果

title: Study finds high school journalism leading the way in financial literacy, even if business isn't part of curriculum
summary_en: Journalism classes usually are not paired with business lessons. While there have been calls for increasing business knowledge in journalism, research from the University of Kansas has found that high school journalists are learning business skills even though they are not a core part of the curriculum.
title_cn: 研究表明高中新闻教育虽未设置商务类核心课程 仍在金融素养培育领域发挥引领作用
